nasb.text: Did not your fathers do the same, so that our God brought on us and on this city all this trouble? Yet you are adding to the wrath on Israel by profaning the sabbath.”

esv.text: Did not your fathers act in this way, and did not our God bring all this disaster on us and on this city? Now you are bringing more wrath on Israel by profaning the Sabbath.”

cnv.text: 從前你們的列祖不是這樣行，以致我們的　神使這一切災禍臨到我們和這城嗎？現在你們褻瀆安息日，使　神的忿怒越發臨到以色列。”

ccb.text: 你们的祖先难道不是犯了这样的罪，以致我们的上帝使一切灾祸临到我们和这城吗？如今你们干犯安息日，使上帝的愤怒更多地临到以色列。”
